---
title: "E Shop Site"
subtitle: "Frontend"
description: "Responsive mockup website for an online cake shop, showcasing products and user-friendly navigation."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-08-26
image: ../utils/bakenest.png
categories:
  - HTML
  - CSS
  - Responsive
  - Bootstrap
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://4bdullah7eeshan.github.io/bakenest/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/bakenest" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>
